name: Russian Refresher Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a medium bowl.
2. Mix well until combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to a 1-quart container.
4. Label as Russian Refresher.
5. Store in a cool, dry place.
6. Use within 6 months.
Makes about 3 1/2 cups of mix.
RUSSIAN REFRESHER:
Add 2 to 3 teaspoons of RUSSIAN REFRESHER MIX to 1 cup hot water.
Stir until dissolved. Makes 1 serving.
